title: How to accelerate sales with Sales Cloud
excerpt: Practical steps to modernize your sales processes using Salesforce.
content:
Sales teams move faster when they have a single source of truth. In this post we explore practical steps to modernize your sales process using Sales Cloud.

Key steps

  • Centralize customer data
  • Automate repetitive tasks
  • Use reports & dashboards to focus actions
